% check a.php
a.php:5:2: $s is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:9:1: $i is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:8:4: $t is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

% check e.php
e.php:4:1: $arr is of type: array (DEBUG)
e.php:17:1: $phase is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:4:1: $keys is of type: array (DEBUG)
d.php:7:1: $len is of type: int (DEBUG)
d.php:10:1: $lower is of type: string (DEBUG)
d.php:13:1: $ok is of type: bool (DEBUG)
d.php:16:1: $x is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

function convert(string $s): int
{
	#debugType $s
}

$i = convert('three');
#debugType $i
% check c.php
# No errors.

-- c.php --
<?php

class Fruit
{
	public string $name;
}

/** @var Fruit $d */

$items = array_map(fn($d) => $d->getDate(), []);
-- b.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	function bar()
	{
		(function($t) {
			#debugType $t
		})();
	}
}
-- d.php --
<?php

$keys = array_keys([1, 2, 3]);
#debugType $keys

$len = strlen('hello');
#debugType $len

$lower = strtolower('HELLO');
#debugType $lower

$ok = in_array('a', []);
#debugType $ok

$x = some_unknown_func();
#debugType $x
% check f.php
f.php:4:1: $m is of type: array (DEBUG)
f.php:10:1: $all is of type: array (DEBUG)

% check g.php
g.php:5:2: $m is of type: array (DEBUG)

% check h.php
h.php:5:2: $m is of type: array (DEBUG)

% check i.php
i.php:10:3: $m is of type: array (DEBUG)

-- f.php --
<?php

preg_match('/(\d+)/', $str, $m);
#debugType $m

$x = $m[0];

$n = preg_match_all('/\w+/', $str, $all);
#debugType $all
-- g.php --
<?php

if (preg_match('/foo/', $s, $m)) {
	#debugType $m
}
-- h.php --
<?php

if (!preg_match('/foo/', $s, $m)) {
	#debugType $m
}
-- i.php --
<?php

class PregTest
{
	public function bar(string $s): void
	{
		if (!preg_match('/(\d+)/', $s, $m)) {
			return;
		}
		#debugType $m
	}
}
-- e.php --
<?php

$arr = [-1, 0, 1];
#debugType $arr

foreach ([1, 2, 3] as $i) {
}

foreach ((array) $values as $id => $v) {
}

$phase = (object) [
	'name'     => "$name",
	'hasError' => false,
	'rows'     => [],
];
#debugType $phase
